Good movie & MBJ did a good job directing for the first time. He definitely learned from Ryan Coogler. I read an article mentioning that MBJ said he wanted the film to be anime af. Well, there are indeed moments that are anime af & I wont spoil them. 

One thing to talk about though, there is potential for a Creed 4 that follows the daughter. And you know what would be cool? Her VS Rocky's granddaughter. Another Creed VS Balboa. If not that, then Creed's daughter VS a Lang.

But Idk if sign language can carry a whole movie. It can carry characters(and they seem to ALWAYS be cool characters. Flash's final season has a villain that speaks in sign language & I like her right away). But a film entirely?

And before anyone mentions the Planet Of The Apes Prequel trilogy, humans were in those films too. So it wasnt 100% sign language from the apes.

And the protag not talking would definitely lower the hype for the training montage & the final fight.

I think a really beautiful way to end the story is this:

Adonis's former friend is actually WINNING the fight and is ahead in score but in the final round Adonis even though he is losing gets in just the right combination of punches and similar to what happened with Conlan back in 2015 his opponent is knocked out and the bell rings but he still has to get up (no save by the bell).

Adonis sees his former closest childhood friend unable to get up.  During the 10 count he keeps trying (he is not fully unconscious but very badly shaken up) and when there are only a few seconds left Adonis runs up to him and lifts him into a standing position despite the illegality of such an action.

The referee and the judges don't know how to handle the situation since he had HELP getting up which is cheating but it happened technically against his will and Adonis is the one who violated the rules.  They decide that the fairest thing to do is count it as a knockout where the fighter successfully got up before the 10 count.  They then add up total score and even though Adonis won the final round from administering the knockout his former friend had a lead before that happened and when the scores are tallied Adonis loses by 1 point.

Adonis loses his title but his former friend, who wanted revenge on him ends up fully forgiving Adonis and their friendship is renewed.
